mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (chatroom_id, member_id, chat_message_content, chat_message_created_at) VALUES (#{chatroomId}, #{memberId}, #{chatMessageContent}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT cm.chat_message_id AS chatMessageId, cm.chatroom_id AS chatroomId, cm.member_id AS memberId, m.member_name AS memberName, cm.chat_message_content AS chatMessageContent, cm.chat_message_created_at AS chatMessageCreatedAt FROM chat_message cm JOIN member m ON cm.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cm.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} ORDER BY cm.chat_message_created_at ASC
